---
layout: cv
title: Resume
---
# Carlos Angarita
Business Analytics student with a strong foundation in data analysis, statistics, and financial analytics. Experienced using Python, R, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, and Excel to solve real-world problems through data-driven analysis. Passionate about transforming data into actionable insights and continuously expanding technical skills through academic and personal projects.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mailto:tatoangarita29@gmail.com">tatoangarita29@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/carlosangarita007726213">My Linkedin</a>
</div>

## Education

`2021-2026`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__


## Technical Skills

### Programming Languages
- Python
- R
- SQL

### Data Analysis 
- Data Cleaning & Preprocessing
- Linear and Logistic Regression

### Data Visualization & Business Intelligence
- Tableau
- Power BI
- ggplot2
- Matplotlib

### Databases
- MySQL


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
